location_context: NTU dormitory AC, learned through IRO5T UART IR module
notes: Fan commands are full-state AC commands: cool mode, 18C, selected fan level. /ir_codes/strong_001.bin remains the known reliable fallback and is not treated as a generated universal command.

fan_1.description: Learned full-state command: cool mode, 18C, fan level 1.

fan_2.description: Learned full-state command: cool mode, 18C, fan level 2.

fan_3.description: Learned full-state command: cool mode, 18C, fan level 3.

fan_4.description: Learned full-state command: cool mode, 18C, fan level 4.

fan_5.description: Learned full-state command: cool mode, 18C, fan level 5.

strong.description: Optional learned Strong command. If missing, firmware falls back to /ir_codes/strong_001.bin.
